'''âp-j-ng''' ('''kapajang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tinsel|tinsel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-j-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tinsel|tinsel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-j-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kapajang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipajang|thipajang]] || [[word:jipajang|jipajang]] || [[word:shipajang|shipajang]] || [[word:kipajang|kipajang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupajang|thuthupajang]] || [[word:jujupajang|jujupajang]] || [[word:shushupajang|shushupajang]] || [[word:kukupajang|kukupajang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupajang|thupajang]] || [[word:jupajang|jupajang]] || [[word:shupajang|shupajang]] || [[word:kupajang|kupajang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupajang|thupajang]] || [[word:jupajang|jupajang]] || [[word:shupajang|shupajang]] || [[word:kupajang|kupajang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepajang|thepajang]] || [[word:jepajang|jepajang]] || [[word:shepajang|shepajang]] || [[word:kepajang|kepajang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopajang|thothopajang]] || [[word:jojopajang|jojopajang]] || [[word:shoshopajang|shoshopajang]] || [[word:kokopajang|kokopajang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopajang|thopajang]] || [[word:jopajang|jopajang]] || [[word:shopajang|shopajang]] || [[word:kopajang|kopajang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopajang|thopajang]] || [[word:jopajang|jopajang]] || [[word:shopajang|shopajang]] || [[word:kopajang|kopajang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpajang|thĂŠpajang]] || [[word:jĂŠpajang|jĂŠpajang]] || [[word:shĂŠpajang|shĂŠpajang]] || [[word:kĂŠpajang|kĂŠpajang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapajang|thathapajang]] || [[word:jajapajang|jajapajang]] || [[word:shashapajang|shashapajang]] || [[word:kakapajang|kakapajang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapajang|thapajang]] || [[word:japajang|japajang]] || [[word:shapajang|shapajang]] || [[word:kapajang|kapajang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapajang|thapajang]] || [[word:japajang|japajang]] || [[word:shapajang|shapajang]] || [[word:kapajang|kapajang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapajang|shapajang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapajang|goshapajang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapajang|gokishapajang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapajangnĂŒ|shapajangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapajangnknĂŒ|goshapajangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapajangnĂŒ|gokishapajangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapajangshĂ«|shapajangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapajangnkshĂ«|goshapajangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapajangshĂ«|gokishapajangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapajangro|shapajangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapajangnkro|goshapajangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapajangro|gokishapajangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapajangmu|shapajangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapajangnkmu|goshapajangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapajangmu|gokishapajangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapajangsher|shapajangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapajangnksher|goshapajangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapajangsher|gokishapajangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapajang|shapajang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapajangnkng|goshapajangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapajang|gokishapajang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapajangya|shapajangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapajangnkya|goshapajangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapajangya|gokishapajangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapajangyam|shapajangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapajangnkyam|goshapajangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapajangyam|gokishapajangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapajangnĂŒshĂ«|shapajangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapajangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapajangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapajangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapajangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapajangnĂŒro|shapajangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapajangnknĂŒro|goshapajangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapajangnĂŒro|gokishapajangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapajangnĂŒmu|shapajangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapajangnknĂŒmu|goshapajangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapajangnĂŒmu|gokishapajangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapajangshĂ«nĂŒ|shapajangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapajangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapajangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapajangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapajangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapajangshĂ«ro|shapajangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapajangnkshĂ«ro|goshapajangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapajangshĂ«ro|gokishapajangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapajangshĂ«mu|shapajangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapajangnkshĂ«mu|goshapajangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapajangshĂ«mu|gokishapajangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapajangronĂŒ|shapajangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapajangnkronĂŒ|goshapajangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapajangronĂŒ|gokishapajangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapajangroshĂ«|shapajangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapajangnkroshĂ«|goshapajangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapajangroshĂ«|gokishapajangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapajangromu|shapajangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapajangnkromu|goshapajangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapajangromu|gokishapajangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapajangmunĂŒ|shapajangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapajangnkmunĂŒ|goshapajangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapajangmunĂŒ|gokishapajangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapajangmushĂ«|shapajangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapajangnkmushĂ«|goshapajangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapajangmushĂ«|gokishapajangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapajangmuro|shapajangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapajangnkmuro|goshapajangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapajangmuro|gokishapajangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
